text: I know tomorrow feels heavy, and it's okay to be scared. You don't have to be brave or calm or anything other than exactly what you are right now. The people around you have done this many times, and they'll be watching over every moment so you don't have to carry any of it alone. Tomorrow you just have to show up and breathe; let everyone else do the rest. And I'll be right here, thinking of you the whole time, waiting on the other side of it. You're going to get through this, and I'm so proud of you for facing it. Rest tonight if you can. You are not alone in this, not for one second.
